_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: Both CQ and bafilomycin A1 resulted in a significantly greater reduction in the viability of NF1−/− deficient cells compared to NF1+/− controls...with the most pronounced effect observed at 48 h
details: Both CQ and bafilomycin A1 resulted in significantly greater reduction in viability compared to NF1+/- controls after 24 and 48h treatment, with most pronounced effect at 48h
